info.title: Adliance.Kimai.Reports
info.description: Takes Kimai time entries and generates nice looking HTML reports.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Some little tool for Adliance that fetches data from Kimai to build some reports.

commands.name: overview
commands.description: Creates an overview report for all users that the API key has access to.

options.name: --url
options.description: The URL to your Kimai instance. For example: https://demo.kimai.org/.

options.name: --config
options.description: The path where you want to store the resulting HTML reports. Defaults to "./config.json".

options.name: --output
options.description: The path where you want to store the resulting HTML reports. Defaults to the current working directory "./".

commands.name: project-report
commands.description: Creates a report for a specific project.

options.name: --url
options.description: The URL to your Kimai instance. For example: https://demo.kimai.org/.

options.name: --config
options.description: The path where you want to store the resulting HTML reports. Defaults to "./config.json".

options.name: --output
options.description: The path where you want to store the resulting HTML reports. Defaults to the current working directory "./".

options.name: --from
options.description: A date to start the report from.

options.name: --to
options.description: A date to start the report from.

options.name: --pool
options.description: The total number of hours in the pool for this project.

options.name: --pool-offset
options.description: A number of hours that need to be added or removed from the pool additionally. Useful for data migrations.

commands.name: example-config
commands.description: Creates an example for the config.json file that is required to specify details for users.
